briefdescription.para: Visual command buffer: events that occurred between the previous decision point and the current one, replayed visually when enableVisuals is true.

memberdef.name: ActionToRule
memberdef.initializer:
= new DispatchingRule[] { DispatchingRule.SPT_SMPT, DispatchingRule.SPT_SRWT, DispatchingRule.LPT_MMUR, DispatchingRule.SRT_SRWT, DispatchingRule.LPT_SMPT, DispatchingRule.LRT_MMUR, DispatchingRule.SRT_SMPT, DispatchingRule.SDT_SRWT,
}

briefdescription.para: Maps agent action index (0-7) to the composite PDR enum.

detaileddescription.para: Matches the action table in Environment.md: | 0 | SPT-SMPT | 1 | SPT-SRWT | 2 | LPT-MMUR | 3 | SRT-SRWT | | 4 | LRT-SMPT | 5 | LRT-MMUR | 6 | SRT-SMPT | 7 | SDT-SRWT |

briefdescription.para: Total number of discrete actions in the action space.
True while an episode is in progress.
True when the episode has ended (all jobs scheduled).
The current decision request. Only valid when the DES is waiting and the episode is active.
True if the DES is paused waiting for an action.
Current simulation time.
Running makespan estimate (max operation end-time so far).
Visual playback speed.
Decisions made so far this episode.
The underlying DES simulator for advanced queries.
Advances the DES event-by-event until it either hits a decision point or runs out of events.

detaileddescription.para: Between decision points, many events may fire (job arrivals that auto-start on idle machines, operation completions on machines with empty queues). These are all processed automatically. Only when TryStartNextOnMachineStepped finds a non-empty queue does the DES pause and return SimStepResult.DecisionRequired.
Visual events are buffered into pendingVisualEvents for optional playback after the step completes.

briefdescription.para: Builds a DecisionRequest from the current DES state.

detaileddescription.para: Captures the pending machine's queue contents and episode-level counters so the agent has everything it needs to choose an action. The full observation tensor (grid, sched matrix, etc.) will be added in Phase 2 via an ObservationBuilder.

briefdescription.para: Computes the step reward from delta-makespan.

detaileddescription.para: The primary signal is the negative change in running makespan since the last decision. This gives a dense, per-step gradient that directly penalises schedule elongation:
A completion bonus proportional to the optimality ratio is added on the final step to reinforce good terminal performance.

briefdescription.para: Max end-time across all operations that have started processing.
Coroutine that auto-plays every decision with the configured fixedRuleIndex, yielding between steps so visuals can update.
Snapshots any new operation starts/completions from the DES.

detaileddescription.para: Called after each ProcessNextEvent in the advance loop. Checks every machine for state transitions at the current time.

memberdef.argsstring: (int machineId, int[] queueSnapshot, DispatchingRule rule, int actionIndex)
memberdef.name: EmitDecisionVisual

briefdescription.para: Records a decision-point flash and log on the machine visual.
Pushes all buffered visual events to the machine visuals.
Waits for visual playback to display between decision points.

detaileddescription.para: Computes the sim-time span of buffered events and converts to a real-time wait via the speed multiplier. Replace with event-driven AGV completion in Phase 1 Step 4.

briefdescription.para: Drives all busy machine progress bars to the current sim time.
Logs final stats and fires OnEpisodeFinished.
Deserialises a Taillard JSON TextAsset.

simplesect.para: Adapt the deserialisation call to match your TaillardInstance API.

briefdescription.para: Initialises a new episode using the Inspector-configured instance.

detaileddescription.para: Loads the Taillard JSON, resets the DES, optionally builds the visual floor, and advances to the first decision point. After this call, CurrentDecision is populated and IsWaitingForAction is true (assuming the instance produces at least one queuing conflict).

briefdescription.para: Starts an episode with an explicit Taillard JSON asset.

parameterdescription.para: TextAsset containing the Taillard instance JSON.

briefdescription.para: The core Gymnasium-style step function.

listitem.para: Validates that the DES is actually waiting for a decision.
Maps the action index (0-7) to a composite DispatchingRule.
Snapshots the queue state for logging/visuals.
Calls DESSimulator.ApplyDecision with the chosen rule.
Advances the DES event-by-event to the next decision point (or end).
Computes the step reward from delta-makespan.
If visuals are enabled, plays back the intermediate events.

parameterdescription.para: Index into the composite PDR action space (0-7).

simplesect.para: A StepResult with reward, done flag, and next decision.

briefdescription.para: Runs an entire episode synchronously with a fixed rule. No visuals. Returns the result immediately.
